thread.title: Sikh yatrees return home today

author: @APP
title: Sikh yatrees return home today
text:
LAHORE : Sikh yatrees from India, who visited Pakistan to celebrate the 555th birthday of Baba Guru Nanak, will return home via the Wagah border crossing today (Saturday). During their stay, they performed religious rituals at Gurdwara Dera Sahib and expressed gratitude to the government of Pakistan for the hospitality and excellent facilities provided to them.
On Thursday and Friday, they performed rituals at Gurdwara Dera Sahib, visited historical sites like the Lahore Fort and Greater Iqbal Park, and enjoyed shopping in Anarkali Bazaar and Shah Alam Market.
